channel.title: Apps on Tony De La Nuez
channel.description: Recent content in Apps on Tony De La Nuez

item.title: vx
item.description:
vx

An offline dictation tool for macOS weighing in at 71mb.

download latest release here

I was working as a security engineer and noticed I was spending a lot of time typing. Enough that it felt like the bottleneck. I also couldn’t use any of the existing voice tools - they all sent audio over-the-wire, which wasn’t really an option.

So I built one that didn’t.

All I needed was press a key, speak, release. Words appear where the cursor is. Nothing leaves the machine.
